title: 他人に危害を及ぼしてはならない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night, when I go to check the track
conditions...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear metallic clanging coming from somewhere...
I look in the direction of the sound and see
Mihono Bourbon running.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Test concluded. All conditions within acceptable
parameters. Load increase confirmed to be safe.
Optimal weight calculated at...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she stands there after her run, I glance at her
feet and see what look to be extremely heavy
weights tied around her ankles.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
These are custom-made ankle weights meant to
increase resistance during training.
choice_data_list: They're kind of noisy for this late at night...
They're kind of noisy for this late at night...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
These are custom-made ankle weights meant to
increase resistance during training.
choice_data_list: They're kind of noisy for this late at night...
They're kind of noisy for this late at night...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The weights pose no issue. Based on my previous
assessments, doubling this load will still fall within
an acceptable range.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I will continue to calculate the most optimal mass
limit for me. Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch Mihono Bourbon as she runs off with ease,
despite having adding more weights to her
ankles.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Concern acknowledged. Auditory disturbances
from nocturnal practice sessions could negatively
impact the surrounding area.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My sincere apologies. I was unaware of the noise
issues. Thank you for bringing this information to
my attention.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Going forward, I shall take appropriate measures,
such as adjusting my practice hours, to ensure I
do not disturb others during training.
